backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining all CMS data types (Artwork, Testimonial, BlogPost, etc.) and providing shared/query functions for managing artworks, inquiries, notifications, site settings, and page view/visitor tracking on the Internet Computer.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented features (skeleton loading screens, back-to-top button, breadcrumb navigation, etc.) to their associated source files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted reference document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key patterns, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript module entry point `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in CMSProvider, AuthProvider, ThemeProvider, and QueryClientProvider, and defines separate public and admin layout components.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutPageE: An admin editor for the About page that allows editing bio, artist statement, portrait image URL, career milestones, and press links with add/remove controls and a save action.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin shell layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, authentication guard (redirects to login if unauthenticated), and renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/admin/ArtworkFor: Modal form component for creating or editing an Artwork, managing fields like title, year, medium, images, and visibility toggles, then calling onSave with the result.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostFo: Modal form for creating or editing a blog post with fields for title, auto-generated slug, content, publish date, and draft/published status.
frontend/src/components/admin/Commission: Admin editor for the Commissions page that allows editing hero text, pricing text, process steps, and FAQ items, persisting changes via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor: Admin form for editing homepage hero content including artist name, tagline, hero image URL, and intro text, saved through the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/InquiryRow: Table row component displaying a single commission inquiry with name, email, project type, budget, date, and a clickable status badge that cycles through statuses.
Grid tile for a media library item showing its image, filename, dimensions, usage info, and inline tag management with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/Navigation: Admin UI component for managing navigation items, allowing adding, removing, and editing nav item labels and paths, with save functionality backed by CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/PressEdito: Admin UI component for managing press mentions (publication, date, headline, URL, excerpt) with add/remove/edit and save functionality via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Admin UI component for managing testimonials (quote, name, location, role) with add/remove/edit and save functionality via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkCard.tsx: Displays a single artwork as a card with image, availability badge, photo count badge, metadata, and a 'Request This Style' button for sold works that navigates to the commissions page.
Fixed circular button that appears after scrolling more than 400px and smoothly scrolls the page back to the top when clicked, styled with the beige/charcoal design system.
frontend/src/components/BeforeAfterSlide: A draggable before/after image comparison slider component that clips the 'before' image based on mouse or touch position, with labels and a divider handle.
frontend/src/components/Breadcrumbs.tsx: A simple breadcrumb navigation component that renders a 'Home' link followed by the current page name.
frontend/src/components/CareerTimeline.t: Renders a vertical timeline of career milestones, each with a year, dot marker, and event description.
frontend/src/components/CommissionInquir: A two-step commission inquiry form with validation that collects project details and submits them via the CMS context, supporting pre-fill from URL search params.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: A simple contact form with name, email, and message fields that validates input and submits inquiries via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/FAQAccordion.tsx: An accordion component that displays a list of FAQ items, toggling one open at a time with an animated chevron indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying branding, social links, navigation, visitor/page-view stats, and an admin sign-in link, pulling data from CMS context and query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a logo, desktop navigation links (active-state highlighted), and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu, driven by CMS navigation items.
frontend/src/components/HeroSlideshow.ts: A full-screen hero slideshow component that cycles through artwork images every 5 seconds with fade transitions, prev/next arrows, dot indicators, and overlaid artist name, tagline, and CTA links.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A modal lightbox component for viewing artworks that supports multi-photo navigation per artwork, keyboard controls (arrow keys/Escape), dot indicators, and displays artwork details in a side panel.
A simple presentational component that renders a muted, italic fallback text span when information is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: A newsletter subscription form that captures an email address and shows a thank-you message on submission, using placeholder text from CMS site settings.
frontend/src/components/PlaceholderImage: A lazy-loading image component that renders a beige placeholder until the element is visible in the viewport, then loads the actual image.
frontend/src/components/PressMentionCard: A card component that displays a press mention with publication name, date, headline, excerpt, and an external link icon.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton component that renders placeholder shimmer cards in three variants—artwork, testimonial, or press—with a configurable count.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonForm.tsx: A loading skeleton component that mimics a multi-field form layout with shimmer placeholders for labels, inputs, and a submit button.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: A single-item testimonial carousel with prev/next buttons and dot indicators that cycles through a list of testimonials.
A two-column grid component that renders all testimonials as bordered quote cards with author name, location, and role.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing simple password-based authentication with login, logout, and change-password operations, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx: Central React context defining all CMS data types (artworks, testimonials, press mentions, inquiries, blog posts, site settings, etc.) and exposing CRUD operations backed by useCMSBackend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCMSBackend.ts: Custom hook that bridges the frontend CMS context types and the ICP backend canister types, providing conversion helpers and backend-connected CRUD operations for all CMS entities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLazyLoad.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to lazily mark a referenced div as visible when it enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Custom hook that updates the document title and meta description based on SEO settings from the CMS context for a given page.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageViewTracker.ts: Custom hook that increments the page view count on mount and returns the current page view count from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating page view counts and unique visitor counts via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniqueVisitorTrack: Custom hook that generates or retrieves a persistent visitor ID from localStorage and registers it as a unique visitor on mount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining a custom design token palette (beige, charcoal, gold, sage) and utility classes for typography, animations, and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying the artist's portrait, bio, social links, career timeline, and press mentions, with skeleton loading states and CMS-driven content.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with a password input form (show/hide toggle) that calls the AuthContext login function and displays an error on failure.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogManager.tsx: Admin blog manager listing all blog posts in a table with publish/draft status toggling, and add/edit/delete actions backed by a modal form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommissionsMana: Admin commissions manager displaying filtered commission inquiries by status with a CSV export feature and skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying summary stats (total artworks, categories, new inquiries, featured works) and quick-action buttons for navigating to gallery, blog, and commissions management.
Admin page for managing artworks with support for adding, editing, deleting, and bulk-updating (featured status, availability) artworks, rendered in a sortable list with an inline ArtworkForm.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaLibrary.ts: Admin media library page that allows uploading images, searching by filename or tag, and displaying all media items in a responsive grid using MediaTile components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagesInbox.t: Admin inbox page showing notifications from commission and contact sources, with filter tabs (all/unread/responded), expandable message rows, status updates, and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PagesEditor.tsx: Admin page editor with tabbed navigation for editing content sections (hero, navigation, about, commissions, testimonials, press) and a preview button that opens the corresponding public page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Settings.tsx: Admin settings page for editing site-wide configuration including SEO metadata per page, social platform URLs, and a change-password form with validation and visibility toggles.
frontend/src/pages/Commissions.tsx: Commissions page showing a hero section, process steps, pricing info, portfolio samples, and an inquiry form with FAQ, all driven by CMS content and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page rendering a message form alongside studio location, a map placeholder, and social media links sourced from CMS site settings.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page that displays filterable, searchable artwork cards with category tabs, a lightbox viewer, and URL-based lightbox opening via `?open=<id>` query param.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero slideshow, artist intro, featured artworks grid, and testimonials section, with navigation to the gallery lightbox on artwork click.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page showing client quotes in either carousel or grid view, plus a press mentions section, both with skeleton loading states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including beige/charcoal/gold/sage color palette using oklch, Cormorant Garamond and Lato font families, custom border radius, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 37) describing the full architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions for Susan Richten's art portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and a local JSON-based CMS with a password-protected admin panel.
